reviews.review_msg: Will is awesome! Took this course as an elective and I did not regret one bit of this class. Only 3 exams and content is super interesting! Lectures are super easy to follow and Will is very passionate about technology and energy. Highly recommend!
The best elective I have taken, course material is very interesting if youre into energy systems and prof is clearly passionate! :D
The best professor. Sounds like Markiplier. Says hello everyone at the start of the class. makes him sound more like markiplier. take this class 10/10

Goated. Lectures were unfortunately 3 hours once a week from 5:30-8:20 but Will somehow managed to still make them engaging. Test heavy (2 miderms + final) but pretty easy / high averages. He was super nice, genuine, and passionate about the topic. The course itself is also great.
Will is the best prof! Take his courses, you won't regret it.

Will always ensures that he engages his class with every lecture and assessment he conducts. Very charismatic, compassionate and open-minded. When I took REM 320W I began to take any course he taught because of how amazing of an instructor he is.
